title: Run end-to-end acceptance for CopilotKit production candidate
goals: Verify the full CopilotKit chat path against running Django, Agent Runtime and Copilot Runtime services.
Record commands, results, failures and residual risks.
non_goals: Do not mask failing e2e checks by narrowing tests without documenting the reason.
Do not write temporary logs outside .local/.
acceptance: Django, Agent Runtime and Copilot Runtime health checks pass.
Legacy rollback smoke is executed or explicitly deferred with risk.
Implementation report and acceptance report are written.
